title: Trump Iran FULL DESPERATE MODE ceasefire not extended
snippet: Trump does NOT intend on extending ceasefire because Iran should be negotiating now. Iran FULL DESPERATE MODE.

title: Trump confirms US controls Strait of Hormuz blockade success
snippet: The blockade has been a tremendous success. Strait stays blocked until final deal is reached.

title: Trump highly unlikely to extend ceasefire Strait blocked
snippet: Trump says highly unlikely he will extend two-week ceasefire, Strait of Hormuz will stay blocked until agreement.

title: Senior Trump officials Vance Hegseth Rubio unscheduled meeting ceasefire expiring
snippet: No official White House confirmation. Senior Trump officials Vance Hegseth Rubio heading to unscheduled meeting tied to Iran ceasefire expiring soon and stalled talks. Gulf tensions high.

title: Iran ceasefire EXPIRED Trump unilateral extension no Iran response
snippet: Initial 2-week ceasefire has now expired. Iran has not issued official response to Trump unilateral extension.

title: TRUMP announces INDEFINITE extension Iran ceasefire at Pakistan request
snippet: Donald Trump announced indefinite extension of Iran ceasefire at request of Shehbaz Sharif. Easing immediate fears of renewed conflict despite stalled negotiations.

title: China record silver imports up 78 pct MoM March
snippet: Chinese silver imports rose 78 pct MoM to record 836 tonnes in March. 173 pct above 10-year seasonal average. Year-to-date 1626 tonnes highest on record.
